title: astragalus geyeri var. triquetrus
intro: Astragalus geyeri var. triquetrus is a type of plant in the legume family, scientifically known as a perennial legume native to the western United States and southwestern Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant has been used to promote health benefits such as reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. Astragalus geyeri var. triquetrus is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, and may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
